design_concept: Logistics Control Tower. A dense, high-contrast, data-driven dashboard optimized for rapid scanning and operational planning. Uses sharp corners, distinct functional colors, and structured grids to establish authority and clarity.

layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 py-6 sm:py-8
layout_and_spacing.table_container: w-full overflow-x-auto border border-zinc-200 rounded-sm bg-white

button.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-zinc-900 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
button.outline: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-white border border-zinc-300 text-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-50 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
button.download: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-200 text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-100 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

badge.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-sm px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border

table.header_cell: px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-zinc-600 uppercase tracking-wider
table.mono_cell: px-4 py-3 text-sm font-mono text-zinc-900 whitespace-nowrap

kpi_card.wrapper: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-sm p-5 flex flex-col gap-2 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden
kpi_card.label: text-xs font-semibold text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-widest
kpi_card.value: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-semibold text-zinc-900 font-mono tracking-tighter

hub_navigation.vertical_list: flex flex-row xl:flex-col gap-1 overflow-x-auto xl:overflow-visible pb-2 xl:pb-0
hub_navigation.vertical_trigger: px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm font-medium text-zinc-600 hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:text-zinc-900 rounded-sm data-[state=active]:bg-zinc-100 data-[state=active]:text-zinc-900 data-[state=active]:border-l-4 data-[state=active]:border-zinc-900 border-l-4 border-transparent transition-all whitespace-nowrap flex-shrink-0 xl:flex-shrink-auto flex justify-between items-center

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Install @phosphor-icons/react. Use Duotone or Bold weights for clear visibility in dense interfaces.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the main layout grid (bento/control tower style).
Use Shadcn components for Select, Popover (Datepicker), Dialog, Tabs, Table.
MANDATORY: Override Shadcn default rounded-md to rounded-sm (2px border radius) across all components for a sharper, more technical aesthetic.

Structure: Top Header (Logo + Sync Button + Last Synced Text). Below it, Date Picker + Helper Text. Then KPI cards. Then a 12-column grid where col-span-2 is a vertical list of Hubs (Hub Navigation) and col-span-10 is the content for the selected Hub.
Inside Hub Content: Display an 'Orders' section (with subtle blue accents/icons) and a 'Returns' section (with subtle amber accents/icons). Each section has its own table.
Use font-mono for Order IDs, Pincodes, and numerical data in tables.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, tabs, date picker, rows).
Data table must handle horizontal overflow gracefully (`overflow-x-auto`).
Add a 'Download All Hubs' button at the top level, and a 'Download Hub' button inside the specific hub view.
